description: This video introduces portfolio management, explaining how to strategically manage a collection of assets and investments, including cryptocurrencies, stocks, and more.
topic_summary: The video covers the basics of portfolio management, emphasizing the importance of managing a portfolio as a whole and how different assets can work together in an investment strategy. Key points include the definition of a portfolio and examples of its components, such as Bitcoin and altcoins [t=0:32-0:47].
